name: sequencer-svg
description: A Node JS tool for building UML sequence diagrams from a JSON or YAML definition, outputting SVG

scripts.examples: node sequencer.js -y -i ./examples/Example_1.1.0.yaml -o -f -t ./examples; node sequencer.js -y -i ./examples/Example_2.1.0.yaml -o -f -t ./examples; node sequencer.js -y -i ./examples/Example_3.1.1.yaml -o -f -t ./examples; node sequencer.js -y -i ./examples/Example_4.1.0.yaml -o -f -t ./examples; node sequencer.js -y -i ./examples/Example_5.1.0.yaml -o -f -t ./examples

author: markthepage
